deny-helm-release-mgmt.description: Blocks Helm release lifecycle changes: uninstall, install, upgrade, rollback.
deny-helm-release-mgmt.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'helm uninstall;helm install;helm upgrade;helm rollback' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-helm-plugin.description: Blocks Helm plugin installs (helm plugin install).
deny-helm-plugin.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'helm plugin install' -i "$CMD" -q
